handled.resolution: Item 10 now groups as the [OUTLET] component (derived from its outlet flange scope), no longer a text-named line.

The two Outlet lines (10 punched, 15 unpunched) now merge into ONE [OUTLET] component; the flange_type disagreement is flagged as CONFLICTING flange_type. General rule now in place: same-component lines in an order merge into one, and conflicting single-valued attributes are flagged.
